title: PR-2 sim-core owner version and caller-owned output surfaces
summary: Add version-bound and caller-owned allocation-free public surfaces for WorkOfferIndex, GridPathfinder, ReservationLedger and M3AbilityCacheStore so WM-0170 can resume unchanged.
acceptance: WorkOfferIndex adds typed ownerVersion, per-row version and monotonic indexVersion lanes. Successful version-bound register/update/remove changes the exact versions once, failed mutation changes none, and owner/index versions remain bound to the selected row rather than supplied as unrelated caller metadata

WorkOfferIndex exposes caller-owned registerOfferInto, updateOfferInto, readOfferInto and selectTopOffersInto (or equivalently reviewed names) whose reusable mutation/read/selection outputs include offer id, owner version, row version, index version, target, score and existing cap metrics without per-call result/array allocation

GridPathfinder exposes findPathInto using a caller-owned bounded Uint32Array route lane plus reusable result output for success and every structured failure; it preserves request/basis/start/goal/cost/node-expansion facts, reports output-capacity failure without partial route publication and allocates no result path

ReservationLedger exposes acquireInto with typed caller-owned prepared-claim scratch, claim-id output and reusable result output. It validates the complete transaction and pending-claim contention first, then commits all claims atomically; every header/claim/conflict/capacity/output failure leaves ledger state, version and outputs deterministically unchanged or reset

M3AbilityCacheStore exposes queryAbilityInto with a caller-owned result lane containing the existing success/failure reason, value/threshold, condition/base versions and visited count for cache hit, rebuild, stale, invalid actor/lane and denied-threshold paths without a per-query result object

Focused allocation probes reuse the exact same scratch/output identities across success and failure loops for all four Into surfaces and record no per-call object, array, typed-array, closure or string construction in their hot implementations; legacy allocating wrappers are explicitly outside this hot-path proof

All existing register/update/read/selectTopOffers, findPath, ReservationLedger.acquire and queryAbility signatures and behavior remain available as compatibility wrappers. Existing snapshots, deterministic hashes, selection order, path results, atomic reservation reasons/cleanup and ability-cache semantics do not change
Every new type and Into surface is exported from the @wuming-town/sim-core package root and focused tests import the public root; no consumer may use an internal-file bypass

M2 work/logistics and M3 ordinary-life 100000-tick hashes/invariants, capacity exhaustion, stale-version rejection, candidate caps, path node/output caps, all reservation channels and ability cache invalidation remain passing
No GameSession/autonomy implementation, sim-protocol, Worker, Web/Pixi/HUD, save/load, runtime dependency, PR-3 command, content or release surface changes
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run packages/sim-core/src/work-offers.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/pathing.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/m3-health.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/owner-hot-path-surfaces.test.ts

history.details: WM-0169 is done. Scoped one additive compatibility repair for the four generic owner public surfaces blocking WM-0170; legacy wrappers/hashes remain, Spark is prohibited, and the task is ready/unclaimed.

saveLoadStance: Additive runtime API compatibility only. Existing snapshots remain byte/semantic compatible and no GameSession save/load format, codec, migration or public promise changes.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-core/src/game-session* or any WM-0170 autonomy implementation
removing, narrowing or behavior-changing legacy allocating wrappers; changing existing snapshots, hashes, stable order, caps, reservation atomicity/reasons or ability semantics
allocating objects, arrays, typed arrays, closures or constructed strings inside the new Into hot paths
packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/**, apps/**, packages/renderer-pixi/**, packages/ui-react/** or Electron/platform files
save/load format or compatibility, new runtime dependency, PR-3 command/building/priority, content expansion or release action
claiming or unblocking WM-0170 before WM-0177 is independently verified, integrated and done
executionLane: simulation-engineer only; Spark is prohibited because the task changes generic deterministic owner APIs, allocation behavior and reservation atomicity
singleWriterRule: WM-0177 is the sole ready product-code writer. WM-0170 remains blocked with its original owner and thresholds; WM-0171..WM-0175 retain their existing dependencies and remain unavailable behind WM-0170.
